---
title: "Metric"
generated: true
description: "Image-pair similarity objective for a registration recipe."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._metric`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Metric -->
```python
class Metric(Protocol)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:Metric -->
Image-pair similarity objective for a registration recipe.

A metric bundles the scalar minimisation cost with an optional
least-squares residual and the two class flags a coarse-to-fine driver
keys its dispatch on.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Metric.cost -->
```python
cost(warped: Float[Array, '*spatial'], fixed: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, mask: Optional[Float[Array, '*spatial']] = None) -> Float[Array, '']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Scalar minimisation cost (lower is a better match).

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Metric.residual -->
```python
residual(warped: Float[Array, '*spatial'], fixed: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, mask: Optional[Float[Array, '*spatial']] = None) -> Float[Array, ' m']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Least-squares residual vector (`is_least_squares` metrics only).

Non-least-squares metrics raise `NotImplementedError`.


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:Metric -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
